quick_jolt.name: Quick Jolt
quick_jolt.description: Deliver a fast kinetic strike that briefly accelerates your movement.

rhythm_burst.name: Rhythm Burst
rhythm_burst.description: Strike in rhythmic succession, delivering multiple hits in a steady tempo.

pulse_step.name: Pulse Step
pulse_step.description: Shift with kinetic precision, increasing initiative and evasion.

shock_thread.name: Shock Thread
shock_thread.description: Send a linear shock-thread through the target, dealing damage with a chance to stagger.

tempo_bloom.name: Tempo Bloom
tempo_bloom.description: Bloom with rhythmic energy, enhancing both speed and offensive tempo.

chain_pulse.name: Chain Pulse
chain_pulse.description: Unleash a combo of pulse strikes that grow stronger with each consecutive hit.

impact_wave.name: Impact Wave
impact_wave.description: Release a shockwave of kinetic force that spreads damage across multiple targets.

pulse_overdrive.name: Pulse Overdrive
pulse_overdrive.description: Enter a high-tempo overdrive state that enhances combo potential and next attack power.

momentum_crash.name: Momentum Crash
momentum_crash.description: Crash into the target with overwhelming force, scaling damage with your current speed.

special.name: SPECIAL
special.description: A hidden Pulse technique reserved for future awakening.
